name: AnalysisBar
summary: The AnalysisBar class contains information related to analysis bars.

constructors.name: AnalysisBar
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisBar class.

methods.name: Add(AnalysisPosition)
methods.summary: Adds a position to the analysis bar.

methods.name: Add(AnalysisPosition, AnalysisMember)
methods.signature: public void Add(AnalysisPosition position, AnalysisMember member)
methods.summary: Adds a position and member to the analysis bar.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis bar. The method is not implemented.

methods.name: GetMembers
methods.summary: Gets the members of the analysis bar.

returns.doc: The members of the analysis bar.

methods.name: GetPositions
methods.summary: Gets the positions of the analysis bar.

returns.doc: The positions of the analysis bar.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis bar. The method is not implemented.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis bar. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisDesignCode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis design code of the analysis bar.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: AnalysisType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis type of the analysis bar.

properties.name: CardinalPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cardinal point of the analysis bar.

properties.name: Composite
properties.summary: Gets or sets the composite beam of the analysis bar.

properties.name: Curvature
properties.summary: Gets or sets the curvature of the analysis bar.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Label
properties.summary: Gets or sets the label of the analysis bar.

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: Gets or sets the material of the analysis bar.

properties.name: Members
properties.summary: Gets the members of the analysis bar.

properties.name: Positions
properties.summary: Gets the positions of the analysis bar.

properties.name: ProfileEnd
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end profile of the analysis bar.

properties.name: ProfileStart
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start profile of the analysis bar.
